rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Elec. Code §279.003, which governs county election officer cybersecurity training and assessments. No overlap in subject matter, authority, or funding mechanism.
quote: Sec. 279.003. ELECTION CYBERSECURITY: COUNTY ELECTION OFFICERS.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses election cybersecurity and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
